sql_array: CREATE TABLE event_logs (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL DAY);
INSERT INTO event_logs (event_id, event_time, duration) VALUES (1, NOW(), INTERVAL '5 days');
UPDATE event_logs SET duration = INTERVAL '10 days' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time + duration AS end_time FROM event_logs;
SELECT * FROM event_logs WHERE duration > INTERVAL '3 days';
